message:
fix(ws): send error response for invalid channel format in subscribe/unsubscribe

Code review fix: subscribe and unsubscribe handlers were silently ignoring
invalid channel formats. Now they send INVALID_CHANNEL error like backfill does.

Changes:
- subscribe: Send INVALID_CHANNEL error when parseChannel returns null
- unsubscribe: Send INVALID_CHANNEL error when parseChannel returns null
- Remove outdated comment in ping case

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
